name: Italian Vegetable Ragout
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can chick peas, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook potatoes, Brussels sprouts, and cauliflower for five minutes.
2. Add Swiss chard and cook for one more minute.
3. Reserve half of the cooking liquid. Drain the vegetables and set aside.
4. Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add onion, celery, and garlic; sauté for three minutes.
5. Stir in marjoram, reserved cooking liquid, tomatoes, zucchini, carrots, salt, pepper, and the reserved vegetables. Stir well, cover, and cook over medium-low heat until the vegetables are just cooked through, 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Stir in chick peas and heat them through.
7. Transfer the ragout to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh basil.
8. Serve over whole wheat spaghetti or steamed brown rice.
